meta.title: Real-Life Maverick: How A Computer Glitch Almost Killed Me
meta.description:
Test pilots are the unsung heroes of aviation. These are the men and women who risk their lives to push the limits of human achievement, breaking barriers and proving the impossible, possible. From the earliest days of aviation to modern space exploration, test pilots have played a crucial role in advancing technology and improving safety.

Buy Book here: https://www.hasardlee.com/copy-of-book-2
Register for Bookplate here: (preorders have ended)


Every 100th person wins a PATCH  👉  https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/patchgiveaway

--

Camera Operator: Nicole Livering
Editor: Michael Cunningham

F-22 footage: Dustin Farrell

SUBSCRIBE for regular videos▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee

HOW TO CONNECT
LinkedIn-- https://www.linkedin.com/in/hasardlee
Instagram-- https://www.instagram.com/hasardlee/
Facebook--https://www.facebook.com/hasardlee
Email--hasard@hasardlee(dot)com

🎙 Listen to the Podcast-- https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/listen

If you're an organization that would like to partner on a video, reach out to hasard@hasardlee(dot)com


00:00 - Intro
01:11 - Scariest Moment
02:04 - A Brush with Death
03:15 - The Best Aircraft
03:54 - Win a Super Sonic Book Plate
05:17- Advice for future pilots
07:05 - Proudest Moment
